ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Quote_Request', OR( ISPICKVAL(Customer_Payment_Method__c, 'Credit Card'), ISPICKVAL(Customer_Payment_Method__c, 'Wire Transfer')), OR( ISBLANK(Contract_Term_In_Months__c ), ISBLANK(Number_of_Installments__c ), ISBLANK(List_of_features_CC_and_Wire_Transfers__c) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill in the Contract Term, Number of installments and List of Features before submitting the request
